frame_analyses.description: Initial setup view of laparoscopic trainer with Penrose drain visible in center, instruments positioned at ports
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean starting position, drain appears properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Instruments entering the field, needle holder visible on left side approaching suture
Needle holder grasping needle while needle driver supports tissue, preparing for first suture pass
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper tissue support with non-dominant hand as instructed

frame_analyses.description: Suture being pulled through tissue, proper technique of grasping behind needle point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Following safety guidelines by grasping suture behind needle

frame_analyses.description: Beginning knot tying sequence, forming C-shape configuration for surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Correct C-shape formation for first throw

frame_analyses.description: Completing double throw for surgeon's knot, using left hand to manipulate suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper surgeon's knot technique with double wrap

frame_analyses.description: First throw being tightened and secured
Switching hand positions for second throw, changing direction
Completing second single throw with opposite hand configuration
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Correct single throw technique with hand switch

frame_analyses.description: Final throw completion, suture ends visible extending from knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears secure, ready for cutting

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw
Single throw with proper hand switch
Final single throw with hand switch

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Excellent demonstration of proper FLS Task 5 technique with correct surgeon's knot formation, appropriate hand switching between throws, and efficient completion time. The trainee followed safety guidelines and produced a secure knot.
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to maintain consistency in suture placement accuracy
Focus on minimizing any small deviations from target marks
